prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. The upper lines of an open scroll lie in cold shadow while the lower lines catch a warm break of light, the dim background receding into deep shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
An open Psalm scroll spread across pale stone, its upper lines of Hebrew sunk in cold shadow and its lower lines catching a warm break of light, dim background vignettes fading into shadow suggesting a forsaken bowed figure, a turning toward light, a gathered congregation, and a standing praising figure. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the scroll with its shadowed and lit lines, the dim vignettes above.

Cut to mid framing — the open scroll across the pale stone.

Cut to macro detail — the shadowed upper Hebrew lines.

Cut to macro detail — the warmly lit lower lines.

Cut to insert — the warm break of light on the parchment.

Cut to upper framing — the dim background vignettes of the turn.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the turning scroll from shadow into light.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Darkness lifting into praise.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no halo added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — scroll with shadowed and lit lines, dim vignettes above
Cut to mid framing — the open scroll across the pale stone
Cut to macro detail — the shadowed upper Hebrew lines
Cut to macro detail — the warmly lit lower lines
Cut to insert — the warm break of light on the parchment
Cut to upper framing — the dim background vignettes of the turn
Return to full composition, end hold on the turning scroll
